candidate_definition_hints.text: This codebase provides the implementation of the Ring Attention with Blockwise Transformers. The model is described in the paper [Ring Attention with Blockwise Transformers for Near-Infinite Context](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2310.01889.pdf) and [Blockwise Parallel Transformer for L…
